revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hase-Yamaguchi-Niimasu Shrine
| native_name = 長谷山口坐神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Hase-Yamaguchi-Niimasu Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.529811|135.905834}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hase-Yamaguchi-Niimasu Shrine'''|長谷山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}
* {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}
** Series ordinal: 126
** P155: {{ill|Oshisaka Nimai Sukune Shrine|lt=Oshisaka Nimai Sukune Shrine|ja|忍坂坐生根神社|qid=Q54153274|1=Oshisaka Nimai Sukune Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q48763696|ltq=Q48763696|qid=Q48763696|1=Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q907495|ltq=Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}}
* {{ill|Shikijō district|lt=Shikijō district|ja|式上郡|zh|式上郡|qid=Q11486985|1=Shikijō district}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|34.529811|135.905834}}

== described by source (P1343) ==

== name in kana (P1814) ==

* ハツ-<ref>Engishiki Jinmyōchō</ref>

{{nihongo|'''Hase-Yamaguchi-Niimasu Shrine'''|長谷山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==
